spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (window., LanguageDetector, Translator) with runtime script (~10307 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Some controls present but the interactive surface is thin (4 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects). Hard to call it hands-on.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (detect, document, five, language, languages, paragraphs, translate, translator).

edge_cases.rationale: Page references 11 edge case / failure / fallback hits and the control surface has room to exercise distinct branches, so the happy path is not the only one shown.

references.rationale: Page does not include the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link — violates the rule #3 self-heal invariant.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 86 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Expand the interactive surface beyond one or two buttons
openQuestions.detail: Add controls that vary the parameters the spec exposes — toggles, ranges, selects — so the user can drive the demo through several distinct states instead of a single one-shot trigger.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link
openQuestions.detail: Page is missing the chromestatus.com/feature/5172811302961152 link inside a `references` section. CLAUDE.md rule #3 requires this on every concept so the slug-recovery script can re-derive the canonical name.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("A JavaScript API to provide language translation capabilities to web pages. Browsers are increasingly offering language translation to their users. Such translation capabilities can also be useful to web developers. This is especially the c") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://webmachinelearning.github.io/translation-api to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~10307 chars of script across 4 button(s) and 0 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail across the six rubric criteria.
